fullText: EX 09 – RF Load Trailer Enhancements Contents TOC \o "1-3" \h \z \u 1 System Code Configuration PAGEREF _Toc45485364 \h 3 1.1 Add or Enable Global System Code PAGEREF _Toc45485365 \h 3 1.2 Add EX09 System Code PAGEREF _Toc45485366 \h 5 1.3 Configure Messages PAGEREF _Toc45485367 \h 6 1.3.1 Message 0901 PAGEREF _Toc45485368 \h 6 1.3.2 Message 0902 PAGEREF _Toc45485369 \h 6 1.3.3 Message 0903 PAGEREF _Toc45485370 \h 7 1.4 RF Load Trailer Custom Configuration PAGEREF _Toc45485371 \h 7 System Code Configuration Add or Enable Global System Code Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI If system code C- 000 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click Add Populate the followin g information: 232410 174433 Note : The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save . Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed right 0 0 0 Click A dd . Populate the following information provided Click S ave to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen System Co de Parameters Screen is displayed Click A dd button. 344805 151933 Populate the following information provided Click S ave . 2343785 9036050 Page 4 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 0 0 Page 4 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 Click on the Parameters tab 189290 417782 C heck the box to Enable system code Click S ave Add EX 09 System Code Navigate to System Codes UI Filter for Code Type 000 Select the Custom Code 000 record Click Code IDs on the bottom right hand corner Click Add to add a Code ID Fill in the following details for EX 09 Code ID Click Save Navigate to the Parameters tab and ensure that the Enablement Flag is turned on . If not enabled, enable it and click Save Configure Message s Message 0901 Navigate to Messages (Configuration) UI Click Message Master 137724 363855 Click the + icon to create a new message Populate the fields above with information provided in the screenshot below Click Save Message 090 2 Navigate to Messages (Configuration) UI Click Message Master 137724 363855 Click the + icon to create a new message Populate the fields above with information provided in the screenshot below Click Save Message 090 3 Navigate to Messages (Configuration) UI Click Message Master 137724 363855 Click the + icon to create a new message Populate the fields above with information provided in the screenshot below Click Save RF Load Trailer Custom Configuration   Open Transaction Parameters UI and search for “ Load Trailer . ” Then click Program Template.       In Transaction Parameters – Program Template, click Add Input the below information and hit Save       Click “Transaction Parameters” again   Select “ Load Trailer ” and click “Edit”   Go to Byte 50 1 -50 1 and check the Y/N flag then “Save”

chunks.text:
[Document: MCLN EX09 RF Load Trailer Enhancements Configuration Guide]

EX 09 – RF Load Trailer Enhancements Contents  1 System Code Configuration  1.1 Add or Enable Global System Code  1.2 Add EX09 System Code  1.3 Configure Messages  1.3.1 Message 0901  1.3.2 Message 0902  1.3.3 Message 0903  1.4 RF Load Trailer Custom Configuration  System Code Configuration Add or Enable Global System Code Navigate to the System Codes (Configuration) UI If system code C- 000 (Global Extension Control) does not yet exist, click Add Populate the followin g information: 232410 174433 Note : The checkbox “System code parameters exist” will auto populate upon completion of subsequent steps for adding parameters, and it is un - editable to the user. Click Save . Next, click the Code ID’s Action Button The System Code ID’s screen is displayed right 0 0 0 Click A dd . Populate the following information provided Click S ave to save the Code ID. Next, Click the Parameters Action button located on the bottom right of the screen to Navigate back to System Code Parameters screen System Co de Parameters Screen is displayed Click A dd button. 344805 151933 Populate the following information provided Click S ave . 2343785 9036050 Page 4 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 0 0 Page 4 of = NUMPAGES 13 13 Click on the Parameters tab 189290 417782 C heck the box to Enable system code Click S ave Add EX 09 System Code Navigate to System Codes UI Filter for Code Type 000 Select the Custom Code 000 record Click Code IDs on the bottom right hand corner Click Add to add a Code ID Fill in the following details for EX 09 Code ID Click Save Navigate to the Parameters tab and ensure that the Enablement Flag is turned on . If not enabled, enable it and click Save Configure Message s Message 0901 Navigate to Messages (Configuration) UI Click Message Master 137724 363855 Click the + icon to create a new message Populate the fields above with information provided in the screenshot below Click Save Message 090 2 Navigate to Messages (Configuration) UI Click Message Master 137724 363855 Click the + icon to create a new message Populate the fields above with information provided in the screenshot below Click Save Message 090 3 Navigate to Messages (Configuration) UI Click Message Master 137724 363855 Click the + icon to create a new message Populate the fields above with information provided in the screenshot below Click Save RF Load Trailer Custom Configuration   Open Transaction Parameters UI and search for “ Load Trailer . ” Then click Program Template.

[Document: MCLN EX09 RF Load Trailer Enhancements Configuration Guide]

UI Click Message Master 137724 363855 Click the + icon to create a new message Populate the fields above with information provided in the screenshot below Click Save RF Load Trailer Custom Configuration   Open Transaction Parameters UI and search for “ Load Trailer . ” Then click Program Template.

In Transaction Parameters – Program Template, click Add Input the below information and hit Save       Click “Transaction Parameters” again   Select “ Load Trailer ” and click “Edit”   Go to Byte 50 1 -50 1 and check the Y/N flag then “Save”
